greenFeatureIdentificationStatus.label: D_trace equals P-M on Green-minimizer traces
greenFeatureIdentificationStatus.reason: The feature-map and quotient factorization identify the trace Schur form as the plus Gram minus the minus Gram.

greenLiftContractionStatus.label: minus feature Gram is dominated by plus feature Gram
greenLiftContractionStatus.reason: The continuum Green-lift closure theorem gives G_-=CKE G_+ and ||CKE||<=1, hence M<=P.

quotientRepairBoundedStatus.label: trace-side repair is bounded
quotientRepairBoundedStatus.reason: The quotient Schur theorem exports the bounded trace-side repair form.

dqVanishesOnXRStatus.label: D_q vanishes on X_R
dqVanishesOnXRStatus.reason: Since P-M>=0, the positive repair part D_q=(M-P)_+ vanishes on the completed trace range.

proof: Use the Volterra/Green feature-map identity to write the trace Schur form as P-M.
Use the continuum Green-lift contraction to prove M<=P.
Conclude the quotient repair D_q=(M-P)_+ is zero on X_R.
